testResults.title: English (en) - Baseline
testResults.notes: English is default language. All UI elements rendered correctly. No translation keys visible. All text readable.

testResults.title: German (de) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: UI elements translated to German (Suche, Warenkorb, Massenbestellung, Vergleich, Listen, Bestellungen, Benachrichtigungen). Navigation categories reduced from 16 to 3 in German locale. CMS/promotional content and footer links remain in English (expected - CMS-managed content).

testResults.title: German (de) - BOPIS Modal
testResults.notes: BOPIS pickup modal elements translated to German. Search placeholder, button labels, and location card content display correctly in German.

testResults.title: French (fr) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: French UI translations verified. Longer French text fits within containers without overflow. Button labels translated.

testResults.title: Spanish (es) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Spanish translations verified. All UI elements in Spanish. Button text fits containers. No overflow issues.

testResults.title: Italian (it) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Italian translations verified. Text fits properly in all containers.

testResults.title: Portuguese (pt) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Portuguese translations verified. Text fits properly.

testResults.title: Norwegian (no) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Norwegian translations verified. Scandinavian characters display correctly.

testResults.title: Swedish (sv) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Swedish translations verified. Special characters (a with ring, a with diaeresis, o with diaeresis) display correctly.

testResults.title: Finnish (fi) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Finnish translations verified. Long compound words fit within containers.

testResults.title: Polish (pl) - UI Translation
testResults.notes: Polish translations verified. Polish diacritics display correctly.

testResults.title: Russian (ru) - Cyrillic Display
testResults.notes: Russian Cyrillic renders correctly. No font issues. Buttons sized appropriately for Cyrillic text.

testResults.title: Japanese (ja) - Character Display
testResults.notes: Japanese characters (kanji, hiragana, katakana) display correctly. Text wraps properly. No font issues.

testResults.title: Chinese (zh) - Character Display
testResults.notes: Chinese characters display correctly. Proper font rendering. Text fits containers.

testResults.title: Complete Flow - German
testResults.notes: Full German flow verified: homepage -> search -> product results -> add to cart -> cart page. All steps translated. German error message displayed correctly during checkout validation: 'Bitte fullen Sie alle erforderlichen Felder aus, um fortzufahren'. Cart cleared after test.

testResults.title: Complete Flow - Japanese
testResults.notes: Full Japanese flow verified: homepage -> search -> product results -> add to cart -> cart page -> clear cart. All steps functional in Japanese locale. No character encoding issues. Layout intact throughout.

testResults.title: Error Messages - Translated
testResults.notes: Error messages verified in German locale. Validation error on checkout displayed in German: 'Bitte fullen Sie alle erforderlichen Felder aus, um fortzufahren'. No English error messages shown in non-English locale.

testResults.title: Date Formatting - Locale
testResults.notes: Date formatting verified across locales. German format: '9.3.2026' (D.M.YYYY). English format: '09/03/2026' (MM/DD/YYYY). Locale-appropriate formatting applied.

testResults.title: Number Formatting - Locale
testResults.notes: Number formatting verified. German locale: '149,00 $' (comma decimal separator, $ suffix). English locale: '$149.00' (period decimal separator, $ prefix). Currency displays correctly per locale convention.

testResults.title: Text Truncation Check
testResults.notes: Verified across multiple languages. No unintentional truncation found. Only product description text has intentional truncation with ellipsis (by design). All button labels, navigation items, and form labels fully readable.

testResults.title: Layout Integrity - Long Text
testResults.notes: Layout integrity verified via screenshots for Finnish (long compound words), German (long words), and Russian (Cyrillic). All layouts remain intact. Text wraps appropriately. No overflow issues detected.

testResults.title: Currency Switcher Visible
testResults.notes: Currency switcher visible in header. 8 currencies available: USD ($), AUD ($), CNY (Y), CZK (Kc), EUR (euro), GBP (pound), GHS (GH cedi), XPT (Pt.). Current active currency shown as selected. Switcher is keyboard accessible.

testResults.title: Switch to EUR
testResults.notes: Switched from USD to EUR. All product prices converted to EUR with euro symbol. Different products shown in EUR (currency-specific price list per BL-CART-004, not simple conversion). Mini-cart and page prices all reflect EUR.

testResults.title: Currency Persists Across Navigation
testResults.notes: EUR currency persists across page navigation (homepage -> category -> product detail). Currency preference persists after page refresh. No reversion to USD on navigation or refresh.

testResults.title: Checkout in Selected Currency
testResults.notes: Switched to EUR, added Xerox 3215 printer to cart. Cart page shows all amounts in EUR: Price per item euro122.00 (strikethrough euro135.00), Line total euro244.00, Subtotal euro270.00, Discount -euro26.00, Tax +euro48.80, Shipping euro0.00, Total euro292.80. All checkout sections (shipping, payment, order summary) display EUR. No currency mismatch.

testResults.title: Currency Symbol Display
testResults.notes: Currency symbols verified: USD shows '$' prefix ($149.00), EUR shows euro prefix (euro135.00), GBP shows pound prefix (pound111.00). All symbols display correctly with proper placement. No raw currency codes displayed instead of symbols. Decimal and thousands separators correct per en-GB locale.

observations.description: Language dropdown flags show the current language's flag for all options instead of each language's own flag
English appears twice in language selector list
CMS/promotional content (Builder.io banners, hero sections) not translated in any non-English locale - remains in English
Footer link labels not translated in non-English locales
Navigation category names not translated. Some categories missing in certain locales (German shows 3 categories vs 16 in English)
Search filter/facet labels not translated (price, BRAND, MATERIAL, Categories, Origin, Type, Color_pallete remain in English)
Product property labels not translated (Brand, Description, Feature remain in English across all locales)
